title: Exline's Doors
body:
# Exline's Doors

![icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3I2Hbe17/fc3ecff0a7357de728de15f665a6839591eea1c0.png)

## Unlock a new world of possibilities with Exline's Doors!

Looking to enhance your Minecraft builds with a variety of new doors? Exline's Doors introduces an array of stylish and functional doors to suit any architectural style. From vanilla-style log doors to unique new models, this mod offers endless design possibilities.

## Features:

- Log Doors: Crafted using any type of log or stem, these doors blend seamlessly with vanilla Minecraft aesthetics. Just use 6 logs or stems to craft your desired door.
- Iron Block Door: Adds a sturdy and secure option for your high-security builds.
- 8 New Door Models: Explore a range of unique designs to give your builds a distinctive look.

## Versatile Crafting:

- Simple and intuitive crafting recipes that fit naturally within the vanilla Minecraft crafting system.
- Perfect for builders looking to diversify their door options and enhance their creations.

## Enhanced Aesthetics:

- Ideal for a variety of building styles, from rustic log cabins to modern mansions.
- Adds depth and variety to your architectural projects, making your builds stand out.

With Exline's Doors, you can elevate your Minecraft designs with a wide selection of new doors. It's an essential addition for any builder looking to expand their creative toolkit.

_Download now and start crafting with Exline's Doors!_

## Compatibility:

Exline's Doors is compatible with the following Minecraft versions for Fabric:
- [1.21, 1.20.6, 1.20.5, 1.20.4](https://modrinth.com/mod/exlines-doors/versions?l=fabric)

# Explore More at ExlineMods!

Thank you for using our mods! For the best experience, visit our official website, [Exline Mods](https://exlinemods.com/).
Why Visit Our Website?

- Early Updates: Get the latest updates faster than other sites.

- Crafting Recipes: Find detailed crafting recipes for our mods.
- Join the Community: Connect with fellow modders and get support via our Discord server.

Get Started!

Visit [Exline Mods](https://exlinemods.com/) now and [join our Discord Server](https://discord.gg/9UVGJGyqbv) to be part of our community. We look forward to seeing you there!
